title: Built-up evaluation shut-in tool operation controlled from the surface
abstract: Embodiments presented provide for a built-up, evaluation, shut-in tool that enables real time and pseudo real time control from the surface. In embodiments, an up-link telemetry indicates well data below a configuration valve to the surface. The wellbore data may be used to indicate when true pressure stabilization is achieved during operations.
claims: 1. An arrangement to evaluate shut-in operations, comprising: a coiled tubing arrangement; an adapter connected to the coiled tubing arrangement at a first end; a cable connected to the adapter at a second end, wherein the cable is installed in the coiled tubing arrangement, the cable comprising: a top package connected to the coiled tubing arrangement; a telemetry cartridge connected to the top package; a carrier with a first modem configured to send and receive signals and data; a digital hydraulic setting tool connected to the carrier; an expandable plug connected to the setting tool; a built-up evaluation shut-in tool connected to the expandable plug; and a bottom arrangement connected to the shut-in tool, the bottom arrangement configured with valve that may be actuated from a signal.
